update.name: CVE-2026-41091-PoC-Exploit
update.description: 🔥 CVE-2026-41091 SolarFlare | Microsoft Defender LPE exploit. Low-privileged users gain NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM via Cloud Files API + NTFS junction trickery. Forces Defender to write malicious payloads to System32 with SYSTEM rights. ⚠️ Actively exploited in wild. CVSS 7.8. Patch: Defender Engine 1.1.26040.8. 🛡️ Educational PoC only.
